input: order-service P99 latency exceeded 5 seconds across all endpoints in the last 10 minutes. No error rate increase observed. Diagnose root cause and decide whether code repair is needed.

expected.rootCause: JVM young-gen GC pause times spiked due to high object allocation rate under traffic. No code defect. Recommend JVM heap tuning (-Xmx/-Xms increase, G1GC MaxGCPauseMillis adjustment) or horizontal scaling.
